title: 3D SmartPhone Totem
description: A Custom totem of undying existing out of a Custom 3Dmodel and Texture
body:
# Custom SmartPhone Totem 

Transform your Minecraft experience with this unique resource pack, which replaces the standard Totem of Undying with a sleek MedPack design! Perfect for survival and adventure-themed worlds, this custom MedPack adds a fresh visual element to your gameplay.

## 🛠 Features:

SmartPhone Design: The Totem of Undying is now represented as a modern SmartPhone.
Compatibility: Works with all Minecraft versions supporting resource packs with 3d-models (1.13+).
Modes: Functional in both survival and creative modes.
Equip your SmartPhone and stay prepared for any challenge that comes your way!

## 👁 Preview:

_Check out how the SmartPhone Totem looks in-game with this preview image._
![Ingame Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mcUjVltc/images/b9006fe2a4b753c0ac8d1d42c34d2a36144e4941.png)

Equip your MedPack and stay prepared for any challenge that comes your way!
